basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Technical Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitk.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Kanpur Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Technical Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Kanpur Technical Assistant position is 28th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor of Science degree or an ITI certificate to be eligible for the Technical Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Technical Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 27,000 per month, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the subject line is correctly filled.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Technical Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Online Interview to assess the suitability of the candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is P/Rect./R&D/2026/095.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Technical Assistant position is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Kanpur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 208016.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
